seo.title: Lost Forty Live Music Night — April 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Live music at Lost Forty Brewing in Little Rock's SoMa District. Local and regional acts every month in the taproom and beer garden.

description: Lost Forty Brewing hosts live music in their sprawling taproom and beer garden on the third Saturday of each month. April's lineup features a mix of local Americana and indie rock acts against the backdrop of some of Arkansas's best craft beer. The beer garden opens at 5 PM for early arrivals — grab a table before the headliner hits at 7. This is a come-as-you-are neighborhood event that draws a cross-section of the SoMa community: young professionals, regulars, and anyone who spotted the A-frame sign on the way to South Main.

image.alt: Live music at Lost Forty Brewing taproom, Little Rock
